tool.name: Mac Read Clipboard
tool.description: Read the current content of the Mac clipboard (pasteboard).

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_clipboard_read
Read the current Mac clipboard content.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_clipboard_read", "query": ""}
```

**Returns:** content (text if available), hasContent, contentType (text/image/file/unknown)
whenToUse: User asks what's on their clipboard
whenNotToUse: User hasn't mentioned clipboard or copying
